name: capstone-extraction-pipeline
description: Capstone: Structured Data Extraction Pipeline for Insurance Claims

scripts.validate: node -e "const {documents} = require('./documents'); const {extractionTool} = require('./schema'); console.log('Documents loaded:', documents.length); console.log('Schema fields:', Object.keys(extractionTool.input_schema.properties).join(', ')); console.log('Setup OK');"
